subject: Chasme Demon count
fact: Two Chasme Demons appear in the cavern to engage the party.

subject: demon casualty count
fact: The party informs Maram il Vass that one demon was killed.

subject: demon casualty count in battle
fact: One Chasme Demon is defeated and dissolves during the battle.
source_quote: One Chasma Demon is defeated and dissolves

subject: Hanging Gardens height
fact: The Hanging Gardens cavern is 100 feet tall.

subject: armor duration
fact: The two sets of armor magically created by Felkur last for eight hours.

subject: armor set count
fact: Felkur magically created two sets of armor.

subject: Spirit Guardians radius
fact: The Spirit Guardians spell creates an area with a 15-foot radius.

subject: Maram il Vass height
fact: Maram il Vass is a seven-foot-tall Yugoloth.

subject: Hag count
fact: Three hags arrived in the Hanging Gardens to take over guarding the prisoners.
